prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `99306f82`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `99306f82`. The rule is: take the non-`1` singleton colors on the main diagonal, use them in top-to-bottom order to fill concentric inner rectangles inside the hollow `1` frame, and let the last color fill the remaining center rectangle. Both summary hints matched the official examples, so I used them as an initial hypothesis and did not need a `notes.md` correction.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_99306f82/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_99306f82/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_99306f82/generator.py#L15). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator matches the task family by explicitly sampling a contiguous diagonal palette, a single hollow `1` rectangle anchored at `(k, k)`, and inner dimensions that leave the same square / near-square center blocks seen in the official task.

Validation passed end-to-end:
- `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 99306f82` -> `4/4 official examples passed`
- `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 99306f82 --n-examples 1000` -> built successfully
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 99306f82` -> `1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/99306f82/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/99306f82/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/99306f82/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/99306f82/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/99306f82/previews/preview_03.png). I opened `preview_01.png`; the generated layouts look visually on-family.
